case_title: 57 TAYLOR I7, LP VS. LUIS CAUICH ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 100178218) AS TO DEFENDANT DELEON, HECTOR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAUICH, LUIS DELEON, HECTOR DOES 1-10 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET, UNIT # 200, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, 94102 SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, LEASE FORFEITED, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMAINTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100178862)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 57 TAYLOR I7, LP AS TO DEFENDANT CAUICH, LUIS DELEON, HECTOR DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
